{"key_event":"Centralized digital state and constrained civil society","reasoning":"Digital welfare, GST/UPI/Aadhaar infrastructure, emergency powers, Article 370, and tighter NGO/media/dissent regulation increased Union executive reach, though uneven order in Manipur and the 2024 coalition kept the state below overwhelming capacity. Civil society remained strong through mass anti-CAA and farmers’ protests, courts, digital publics, regional parties, and the 2024 electoral check, but institutional watchdog erosion, funding restrictions, polarization, and coercive legal pressure reduced its autonomy from the 2005-2014 peak.","society_change":-0.6,"society_power":8.4,"state_change":0.3,"state_power":8.8}
